mutations.change: Use the integer column coordinate instead of the center coordinate column plus one half in the camera-x expression.
mutations.reason: Even-width framing has no center column and the two center rays must straddle zero symmetrically.

mutations.change: Normalize every camera ray before intersection and thereby change t away from perpendicular camera distance.
mutations.reason: The independent oracle requires ray dot direction equal to one for every generated column.

mutations.change: Flip one term of the ray and segment determinant while retaining the original numerators.
mutations.reason: Oblique hand cases and all E1M1 diagnostic tuples expose inconsistent determinant orientation.

mutations.change: Reject only determinant exactly zero instead of applying the absolute one-e-minus-twelve parallel threshold.
mutations.reason: Near-parallel hand probes bracket the mandated epsilon and prevent unstable division.

mutations.change: Accept intersections whose ray parameter is zero or negative rather than requiring t greater than one-e-minus-nine.
mutations.reason: The behind-camera fixture and exact threshold probes distinguish the strict positive condition.

mutations.change: Use strict u inequalities and discard intersections exactly at either segment endpoint.
mutations.reason: Both endpoint values are explicitly accepted by Appendix B and exercised by vertex ties.

mutations.change: Order equal-depth hits by descending linedef id instead of the approved stable ascending tuple.
mutations.reason: The vertex-tie fixture intersects two distinct segments at exactly the same ray parameter.

mutations.change: Swap right and left sidedef selection for the player side of each directed linedef.
mutations.reason: Hand orientation and E1M1 probes freeze the independently derived facing side and sidedef.

mutations.change: Terminate at the first analytic hit even when that line is an open two-sided portal.
mutations.reason: The visible map poses contain ordered portal hits before the independently selected solid boundary.

mutations.change: Treat SDO_FILTER candidate rows as exact intersections without applying determinant and t-u range predicates.
mutations.reason: Spatial MBR filtering is candidate reduction only and intentionally includes non-intersecting segments.

mutations.change: Construct the frustum using pinned map bounds rather than pose, FOV, and configured far distance.
mutations.reason: The translated mini-map must preserve all analytic results outside the original fixture coordinates.

mutations.change: Mirror coordinates without reflecting the camera heading or reversing the expected ray-column relationship.
mutations.reason: The mirrored fixture relates corresponding columns through an explicit geometric transformation.

mutations.change: Generate columns one through 319 or otherwise omit exactly one endpoint column from the relational generator.
mutations.reason: Discovery requires the complete exact key set zero through 319 with no gaps or duplicates.

mutations.change: Inline known visible pose coordinates in production instead of reading the requested player row through the session bind.
mutations.reason: Source auditing and transformed fixtures require general pose inputs and reject evaluator-specific coordinates.

mutations.change: Loop over columns or walls in PL/SQL rather than expressing ray generation and intersections as relational SQL.
mutations.reason: The charter requires SQL ownership of rendering and forbids procedural pixel or wall loops.

mutations.change: Round ray components or intersection parameters before comparisons and stable ordering.
mutations.reason: Near-boundary and center-column probes require full calculation precision with tolerance only at comparison time.
